summary: Media Validation | Search with Invalid Game PK
gherkin:
When the user visits the Operator tool and logs in
Then the user should be successfully logged into the platform
When the user navigates to the "Media Validation" page
Then the user should be taken to the "Media Validation" page
And the user should see "Litmus" on the top header of the page
When the user enters "111abc" into the "Search For GamePk" search field.
Then the user should see the "No Games Today" header text

steps.action: *When* the user visits the Operator tool and logs in
